task_completion.description: Verify that the Quotes sequence prefix is set to 'QUO-2026-' and the starting sequence is '10000'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a CRM settings or sequence configuration page showing the Quotes module with the prefix field containing 'QUO-2026-' and the sequence/start number field containing '10000'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Invoice sequence prefix is set to 'INV-2026-' and the starting sequence is '5000'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a CRM settings or sequence configuration page showing the Invoice module with the prefix field containing 'INV-2026-' and the sequence/start number field containing '5000'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Purchase Order sequence prefix is set to 'PO-2026-' and the starting sequence is '8000'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a CRM settings or sequence configuration page showing the Purchase Order module with the prefix field containing 'PO-2026-' and the sequence/start number field containing '8000'.

task_completion.description: Verify that a test Quote is created with the subject 'FY2026 Numbering Test' for an existing organization.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Quote creation form or a saved Quote details page where the Subject field is exactly 'FY2026 Numbering Test' and an Organization Name (like Chemex Labs) is selected.

task_completion.description: Verify that the newly created test Quote automatically received the correct sequence ID.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the saved Quote details page or list view showing the test Quote ('FY2026 Numbering Test') with its assigned Quote Number clearly visible as 'QUO-2026-10000'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the CRM's graphical user interface to configure the sequences.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the agent navigating the CRM's admin/settings menus and filling out web forms, rather than using a terminal, API client, or database management tool.

integrity.description: Ensure the test Quote was created through the CRM application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Quote creation and details should be visible within the standard CRM web interface, not mocked up in a text editor, local HTML file, or injected via terminal scripts.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not bypass the UI by directly updating the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open showing SQL UPDATE commands or python scripts modifying the sequence numbers or creating the quote.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The required configuration values are: Quotes prefix 'QUO-2026-' with start sequence 10000; Invoice prefix 'INV-2026-' with start sequence 5000; Purchase Order prefix 'PO-2026-' with start sequence 8000. The test Quote must have the subject 'FY2026 Numbering Test' and its automatically generated quote number must be exactly 'QUO-2026-10000'.
